channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: 9 underdogs to watch at the 2025 Masters
item.description: The Masters is finally here, and while most eyes will be on the favorites, we've got you covered with some sneaky picks for the tournament.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Eriksson Ek, Kaprizov return to lead the Wild past the Sharks, 8-7 in overtime
item.description: ST. PAUL, Minn. (AP) — Joel Eriksson Ek scored a career-high four goals in his return from a lower-body injury, Kirill Kaprizov had his second of the game in overtime in his first game back and the Minnesota Wild outlasted the San Jose Sharks 8-7 on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lionel Messi and Inter Miami pull off 3-goal rally to top LAFC and make CONCACAF Champions Cup semis
item.description: FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. (AP) — Down 1-0 on the scoreboard, down 2-0 in total goals in the series and needing three goals to advance, Inter Miami needed a most unlikely rally. Lionel Messi made it happen.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Goals aplenty! A season-high 4 hat tricks in Wednesday's NHL action
item.description: There were plenty of goals scored in the NHL on Wednesday night and four players accounted for a bulk of them.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Lonzo Ball meets family of meniscus donor who helped revive his NBA career
item.description: The Reinhardt family donated Alex's organs, which helped save the life of Chicago Bulls guard Lonzo Ball after he underwent cadaver meniscus transplant surgery.
item.dc:creator: Dana Rebik, WGN 9

item.title: Luka Doncic scores 45 points in Dallas return as Lakers clinch playoff spot with 112-97 win
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Luka Doncic scored 45 points in his first game in Dallas since being traded to the Los Angeles, helping the Lakers wrap up a playoff spot with a 112-97 victory over the Mavericks on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Taylor and Serrano to headline again at Madison Square Garden. This time, all the fighters are women
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — When Katie Taylor and Amanda Serrano fought three years ago at Madison Square Garden, it did more than open a thrilling rivalry between two of boxing's best. It opened doors for women's boxers that neither could have imagined were ever available.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: NFL exec calls Shedeur Sanders 'fringe starter,' wary of pro upside: report
item.description: One NFC personnel executive referred to Shedeur Sanders as a 'fringe starter' despite being a consensus first-round pick in the 2025 NFL Draft.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: France's Dominique Malonga among players to watch during WNBA draft after Paige Bueckers goes No. 1
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Paige Bueckers is clearly the best-known player in Monday's WNBA draft, but Dominique Malonga of France is among the most interesting. Curiosity around the 6-foot-6 forward seems to be growing.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Double vision: Denmark's Nicolai and Rasmus Hojgaard set to become first twins to play the Masters
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — Rasmus Hojgaard and his identical twin brother Nicolai grew up playing golf in Denmark, occasionally pretending they were on the other side of the world at Augusta National.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: MLB legend Pedro Martinez reveals family members missing after roof collapse in Dominican Republic
item.description: Baseball Hall of Famer Pedro Martinez said he still has family members missing after a roof collapsed at a popular nightclub in the Dominican Republic.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Alex Ovechkin admits he had doubts about reaching Wayne Gretzky record
item.description: Washington Capitals star Alex Ovechkin appeared on Fox News Channel's "Fox & Friends" on Wednesday to talk his record-setting achievement.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jaylon Johnson wants to see real accountability before he says the Bears have changed for the better
item.description: Jaylon Johnson is heading into his sixth NFL season and third go-around riding Chicago's head coaching carousel, and is excited to see the positive change that has eluded them since he joined the franchise, and is looking forward to the Bears' fresh start with new head coach Ben Johnson.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Loyola University Chicago sent preservation notice tied to federally indicted ex-Michigan coach
item.description: Loyola University Chicago has received a preservation notice from attorneys representing a former student-athlete, compelling the school to preserve evidence related to the indictment of former Michigan football assistant coach Matt Weiss on unauthorized computer access and identity theft charges.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Salt Lake Bees celebrate first home game at new Daybreak ballpark
item.description: The Bees will welcome the Reno Aces for a six-game homestand starting April 8, which will include giveaways, music, and activities for the whole family.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Walter Clayton Jr.'s defensive stop gives Florida its 3rd national title with 65-63 win over Houston
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Florida’s Walter Clayton Jr. came up with the perfect going-away present for that spirit-crushing Houston defense that bullied, battered and bedeviled him all night. It was a defensive gem of his own. Right before the buzzer. For the win and the national title.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Northwestern University to settle lawsuit over football program hazing allegations
item.description: Northwestern University has agreed to settle a lawsuit filed by students against the school and former head coach Pat Fitzgerald, who alleged hazing incidents took place in the football program, but the settlement does not resolve Fitzgerald's lawsuit against the university.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Trump honors Dodgers' 2024 World Series championship team
item.description: (KTLA) -- President Donald Trump welcomed Shohei Ohtani, Mookie Betts and the reigning champion Los Angeles Dodgers to the White House on Monday to congratulate them for winning the World Series last season. "That is a very good-looking group of people," Trump said as he began his remarks.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KRON4

item.title: Jaquan Brisker's bond with Bears' DC Dennis Allen predates his NFL career
item.description: Jaquan Brisker was originally drafted by the Saints, but instead joined the Bears, where he will be reunited with his former defensive coordinator, Dennis Allen, who is now the Bears' defensive coordinator.
item.dc:creator: Kaitlin Sharkey, WGN 9

item.title: Justin Turner's error allows Fernando Tatis Jr. to score go-ahead run in Padres' 8-7 win over Cubs
item.description: Luis Arraez had four hits, Fernando Tatis Jr. scored the go-ahead run in the ninth inning when first baseman Justin Turner couldn't make the catch to finish a double play, and the San Diego Padres beat the Chicago Cubs 8-7 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: UConn returns to top of women's basketball, dominates South Carolina 82-59 to capture its 12th title
item.description: Dawn Staley and South Carolina hope to finish off a second straight season with an NCAA championship, which would give the Gamecocks a third title in four years. To do so, they'll need to beat Paige Bueckers and UConn on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Florida makes push all the way to NCAA title game, set to face Houston
item.description: Florida has gone from being picked to finish sixth in the rugged Southeastern Conference to pushing all the way to the final Monday night of the season.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Red Rocks roll into the NCAA Nationals again
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - For the 49th straight year, the Utah gymnastics team is headed to the NCAA Nationals. The #4 Red Rocks won their NCAA Regional Final meet, edging past #5 UCLA, Denver and Minnesota on Saturday with a score of 197.825.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: The Final Four again has multiple 5th-year starters. This time, it's a farewell to an uncommon era
item.description: “Credit to the NCAA for giving us a year back because that COVID year, that wasn’t real, honestly. Nah, it wasn’t fun at all.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: Defending national champion South Carolina returns to women's title game with 74-57 rout of Texas
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — Dawn Staley has never lost a national championship game in three trips as South Carolina's coach. Part of the key to winning those decisive games? Forgetting about what happened the last time she was there. And this time, that was only a year ago.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Cubs home opener: Some things to know for fans heading to Wrigley Field on Friday
item.description: CHICAGO — For fans attending Wrigley Field for the Cubs homer opener Friday afternoon, there are some numbers to keep in mind. The Wrigley Field fan text messaging service is available in the ballpark to report issues in the park without leaving your seat at the game.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: White Sox fall to Twins, 6-1, to drop rubber match of 3-game series after lengthy rain delay on South Side
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Harrison Bader and Byron Buxton hit home runs to back Pablo López's solid start, and the Minnesota Twins beat the Chicago White Sox, 6-1, on Wednesday after rain delayed the start by nearly 3 1/2 hours.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
